title: thymus × welwitschii subsp. ilerdensis
intro: Thymus × welwitschii subsp. ilerdensis, also known as the Ilerdensis Thyme, is a hybrid subspecies of the Thymus genus, a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various ailments. The health benefits of Thymus × welwitschii subsp. ilerdensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
